DESCRIPTION:
Send the same CREATE VALID message twice.

Because send_gpd_message derives the Idempotency-Key deterministically from
the message id (msg_id), reusing the same payload reuses the same key.

Expectations:
- Both calls return HTTP 200 (idempotent, not an error).
- The resourceId in both responses is identical, proving the API returned
  the cached response and did not process the message twice.
- Querying by notice number returns exactly one RTP, confirming that only
  one record was written to the database.
NAME: Two CREATE VALID messages with the same Idempotency-Key both succeed but only one RTP is stored
Get list of service providers successfully

NAME: An RTP is sent through POSTE API

DESCRIPTION:
Test RFC callback DS12N with RJCR status, cancel triggered via REST Web API with explicit reason.

Flow:
1. Activate payer
2. Send an RTP via GPD message (CREATE VALID)
3. Cancel the RTP via REST cancel endpoint with cancel_reason → RTP to RFC_SENT
4. Send DS12N callback with CxlStsId RJCR (Rejected Cancellation Request)
5. Verify callback is accepted (200)
6. Verify RTP status is ERROR_CANCEL
NAME: An RFC callback DS12N RJCR is successfully received and RTP status is ERROR_CANCEL - through Web API cancel
Deactivation fails for activation by another service provider

DESCRIPTION:
Test RFC callback DS12P with non-existing service provider, cancel via REST Web API.

Flow:
1. Activate payer
2. Send an RTP via GPD message (CREATE VALID)
3. Cancel the RTP via REST cancel endpoint with cancel_reason → RTP to RFC_SENT
4. Send DS12P callback with non-existing BIC (MOCKSP99)
5. Verify callback is rejected with 400 (service provider not found)
NAME: Failed RFC callback for non existing Service Provider - DS-12P CNCL compliant - through Web API cancel
Non-existent NextActivationId returns 200 with empty body

DESCRIPTION:
Test RFC callback DS12N with INVALID status, cancel via REST Web API.

Flow:
1. Activate payer
2. Send an RTP via GPD message (CREATE VALID)
3. Cancel the RTP via REST cancel endpoint with cancel_reason → RTP to RFC_SENT
4. Send DS12N callback with CxlStsId INVALID
5. Verify callback is rejected with 400
6. Verify RTP status is still RFC_SENT
NAME: An RFC callback DS12N INVALID is rejected with 400 - through Web API cancel
The service returns the mocked server error
